AOESECONDARY.ModuleDescription: Adds a configurable secondary AoE activity to D&D5e items. The module integrates with complete Midi-QOL workflows to automatically apply a secondary activity around the primary target.
AOESECONDARY.SETTINGS.DebugHint: Show detailed module logs in the Foundry console. In normal use, only helpful warnings and important errors remain visible.
AOESECONDARY.APP.Title: Secondary AoE Configuration
AOESECONDARY.APP.AutomationProfileApplie: Could not apply AoE automation settings: {reason}
AOESECONDARY.APP.AutomationProfileApplyE: An error occurred while applying AoE automation settings.
AOESECONDARY.APP.AutomationProfilePartia: some properties could not be updated
AOESECONDARY.APP.AutomationProfileFailed: this profile cannot be applied to this item
AOESECONDARY.UI.EnabledHint: Enable secondary resolution for this item.
AOESECONDARY.UI.RadiusHint: Radius used to find secondary targets.
AOESECONDARY.UI.IncludePrimaryTargetHint: Also include the primary target among the secondary targets.
AOESECONDARY.UI.TriggerHint: When the secondary activity is triggered automatically.
AOESECONDARY.UI.SecondaryActivityHint: Choose the secondary activity to use.
AOESECONDARY.UI.NoActivitiesHint: This item currently has no detected activities.
AOESECONDARY.UI.SelectionModeHint: The current MVP uses selection around the target creature.
AOESECONDARY.UI.DistanceModeHint: The current MVP uses center-to-center measurement.
AOESECONDARY.UI.MidiWorkflowReminder: Automatic triggering requires a complete Midi-QOL workflow on the user side.
AOESECONDARY.UI.MidiWorkflowReminderTool: If a player only produces a chat card without a complete Midi-QOL workflow, the Secondary AoE will not trigger.
